notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate Skill with the command-gateway recipe in single mode. Coverage: REST controller send(cmd,metadata)->resultAs(Void.class) (main gotcha), REST controller sendAndWait->preferred async, @Scheduled sendAndWait->import-only, Rejected (handler class with @EventHandler). Fixtures live in evals/fixtures/synthetic/ (new) and evals/fixtures/axon4/heroes/ (shared).

evals.name: spring-rest-send-with-metadata
evals.prompt:
You are running eval `1: spring-rest-send-with-metadata` for the `axon4to5-migrate` Skill. The Skill lives at `$SKILL_DIR`. Load `$SKILL_DIR/SKILL.md`, `$SKILL_DIR/patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`, and (if you need fuller before/after walkthroughs) `$SKILL_DIR/examples/ALL_EXAMPLES.md`.

**Skip SKILL.md Step 1** (the Q1/Q2/Q3 AskUserQuestion prompts) — pin these answers directly: `configuration=spring`, Migration approach **B (AI only)**, `skip-openrewrite=true` (the harness has no Maven/Gradle project and you cannot invoke another Skill recursively). **Skip Step 2.5** progress tracking — there is no project root, just a single workspace directory.

The migration target is the file at `$SOURCE`. Its parent directory `$WORKSPACE/outputs/` is the working directory; treat any `secondary_fixtures` siblings already staged there as additional in-scope files. Migrate every target file IN PLACE.

**Identify the AF4 shapes in `$SOURCE` against `patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`** and apply the matching pattern(s). The patterns this eval exercises are: `patterns/30-event-handlers/command-dispatcher.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/command-gateway-top-level.md`. Reach for `examples/command-gateway/01-rest-controller-send-with-metadata.md` when you need a full before/after walkthrough.

**Eval-specific guidance:** OrderRestController is a Spring @RestController. It imports AF4 CommandGateway (org.axonframework.commandhandling.gateway.CommandGateway) and returns `commandGateway.send(command, RequestContext.with(userId))` from a `CompletableFuture<Void>` method. Apply the command-gateway recipe: (1) swap the CommandGateway import to AF5 (org.axonframework.messaging.commandhandling.gateway.CommandGateway), (2) append .resultAs(Void.class) to the send call so the return type compiles. Field type, constructor, and method signature stay the same.

Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** ✅ Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-command-gateway` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.
evals.expected_output: AF5 CommandGateway import; .resultAs(Void.class) appended; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-command-gateway

evals.name: spring-rest-sendandwait-to-async
evals.prompt:
You are running eval `2: spring-rest-sendandwait-to-async` for the `axon4to5-migrate` Skill. The Skill lives at `$SKILL_DIR`. Load `$SKILL_DIR/SKILL.md`, `$SKILL_DIR/patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`, and (if you need fuller before/after walkthroughs) `$SKILL_DIR/examples/ALL_EXAMPLES.md`.

**Skip SKILL.md Step 1** (the Q1/Q2/Q3 AskUserQuestion prompts) — pin these answers directly: `configuration=spring`, Migration approach **B (AI only)**, `skip-openrewrite=true` (the harness has no Maven/Gradle project and you cannot invoke another Skill recursively). **Skip Step 2.5** progress tracking — there is no project root, just a single workspace directory.

The migration target is the file at `$SOURCE`. Its parent directory `$WORKSPACE/outputs/` is the working directory; treat any `secondary_fixtures` siblings already staged there as additional in-scope files. Migrate every target file IN PLACE.

**Identify the AF4 shapes in `$SOURCE` against `patterns/ALL_IN_ONE.md`** and apply the matching pattern(s). The patterns this eval exercises are: `patterns/30-event-handlers/command-dispatcher.md`, `patterns/30-event-handlers/command-gateway-top-level.md`. Reach for `examples/command-gateway/02-rest-controller-sendandwait-to-async.md` when you need a full before/after walkthrough.

**Eval-specific guidance:** CapacityRestController is a Spring @RestController. It uses commandGateway.sendAndWait(cmd, ReservationResult.class) in a method returning ReservationResult (blocking). Apply the matching patterns: (1) swap CommandGateway import to AF5, (2) prefer async — upgrade method return type from ReservationResult to CompletableFuture<ReservationResult>, rewrite sendAndWait(cmd, ReservationResult.class) to send(cmd, ReservationResult.class), add import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture.

Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** ✅ Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-command-gateway` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.
evals.expected_output: AF5 CommandGateway import; method returns CompletableFuture<ReservationResult>; sendAndWait replaced by send(cmd, R.class); CompletableFuture import added; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-command-gateway

assertions.text: Method return type upgraded to CompletableFuture<ReservationResult>

evals.name: spring-scheduled-sendandwait-import-only

Do NOT introduce CompletableFuture or change the method signature.

Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** ✅ Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-command-gateway` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.

**Eval-specific guidance:** WhenCreatureRecruitedThenAddToArmyProcessor has an @EventHandler method AND injects CommandGateway as a class-level field. this file is out of scope for the matching pattern set (Reject). The source MUST stay byte-identical — no AF5 CommandGateway import, no @Namespace, no CommandDispatcher.

This eval expects a **Rejected** outcome. The file is out of scope for the `command-gateway` pattern set (e.g. a projector when this recipe targets aggregates, an aggregate when this recipe targets sagas). Do not migrate it — record Rejected in the Result block.

The source must NOT be edited — no patterns from this recipe apply. Write the `**Result:**` block to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md` with `**Result:** ⏭️ Rejected`, `**Recipe:** axon4to5-command-gateway`, and a `**Notes:**` line explaining why this file is not in scope for the command-gateway pattern set.
evals.expected_output: Event-handler class rejected; source untouched; Result: ⏭️ Rejected with NOTES naming event-processor recipe.
expectations: Notes name event-processor recipe as routing target
Source untouched: AF4 CommandGateway import still present
No AF5 CommandGateway import swapped in

assertions.text: Notes name event-processor as the routing target
